channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: AEP raises capital plan to $78 billion as data centre power demand skyrockets
item.description: American Electric Power is boosting its investment plan to $78 billion. This increase is driven by the rapid growth of data centres. These power-hungry facilities are needed for artificial intelligence. AEP is investing in generation and transmission infrastr… [Intel]

item.description: The Machine Vision Market is gaining significant momentum as industries worldwide increasingly adopt automation technologies to enhance productivity, improve product quality, and reduce operational costs. The integration of artificial intelligence (AI), deep … [Intel]

item.title: ​Voice AI firm ElevenLabs tops $500 million ARR; announces additional funding
item.description: Voice AI startup ElevenLabs has announced its annual recurring revenue has surpassed $500 million in early 2026. The company also secured additional funding in its Series D round, valuing it at $11 billion. This investment will fuel platform advancements and …

item.title: Alphabet closes in on Nvidia's spot as world's biggest company
item.description: Alphabet is nearing the top spot as the world's most valuable company. Its stock is surging due to strong artificial intelligence progress and a booming cloud business. This shift highlights Alphabet's growing role as an AI services provider and a competitor … [Alphabet, Intel, Nvidia, Spotify]
